seoTitle: How to Build a Pop-Up Modal in Webflow
metaDescription: Create a custom animated pop-up modal in Webflow using fixed positioning, overlay backgrounds, and click interactions.
intro: A well-built pop-up modal can capture leads or share an announcement without feeling intrusive, but it needs the right layout structure to avoid blocking clicks or breaking alignment. This guide covers building the overlay, styling the modal card, and wiring up open and close interactions natively in Webflow. It's for designers who want a functional modal without custom scripts.

steps.heading: Build the overlay structure
steps.body: Add a wrapper div block, set it to fixed position and full-width, and give it a high z-index so it floats above your main content.

steps.heading: Style the overlay background
steps.body: Set a semi-transparent background color on the overlay to dim the page behind the modal.

steps.heading: Add the modal card
steps.body: Nest a relatively positioned container inside the overlay for your actual modal content, and style its border radius and padding.

steps.heading: Build the trigger and close interactions
steps.body: Add a trigger button on the page, then use the interactions panel to switch the overlay's display from none to flex on click, and pair a close icon with a reverse interaction.

steps.heading: Test and finalize
steps.body: Preview the open and close animations across breakpoints, confirm the hidden overlay uses display none so it doesn't block clicks, and publish.

faq.question: Why does my modal block clicks even when it's supposed to be hidden?
faq.answer: Make sure the overlay's default state is set to display none rather than just reduced opacity, since opacity alone still blocks interaction.

faq.question: Can I trigger the modal automatically after a delay?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use a Page Load trigger with a timed delay instead of a click trigger to open the modal automatically.

faq.question: How do I make the modal close when clicking outside it?
faq.answer: Add a click interaction to the overlay background itself that mirrors the close action used on the close icon.

faq.question: Will the modal work correctly on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes, but test the modal's sizing and padding on smaller viewports to make sure it doesn't overflow the screen.
